choose.when: AND (u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%'))
choose.otherwise: AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.board_id, b.board_code, b.board_name, p.title, p.writer_id, u.name AS writer_name, u.username AS writer_username, p.view_count, p.is_notice, p.is_secret, p.created_at, p.created_by, p.updated_at, p.updated_by, p.deleted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment c WHERE c.post_id = p.id AND c.deleted = 0) AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file f WHERE f.ref_type = 'POST' AND f.ref_id = p.id AND f.deleted = 0) AS file_count FROM board_post p INNER JOIN board b ON p.board_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.writer_id = u.id WHERE p.board_id = #{boardId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.is_notice = 0
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{request.size} OFFSET #{request.offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.writer_id = u.id WHERE p.board_id = #{boardId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.is_notice = 0

SELECT p.id, p.board_id, b.board_code, b.board_name, p.title, p.writer_id, u.name AS writer_name, u.username AS writer_username, p.view_count, p.is_notice, p.is_secret, p.created_at, p.created_by, p.updated_at, p.updated_by, p.deleted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment c WHERE c.post_id = p.id AND c.deleted = 0) AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file f WHERE f.ref_type = 'POST' AND f.ref_id = p.id AND f.deleted = 0) AS file_count FROM board_post p INNER JOIN board b ON p.board_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.writer_id = u.id WHERE p.board_id = #{boardId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.is_notice = 1 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.board_id, b.board_code, b.board_name, p.title, p.content, p.writer_id, u.name AS writer_name, u.username AS writer_username, p.view_count, p.is_notice, p.is_secret, p.created_at, p.created_by, p.updated_at, p.updated_by, p.deleted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment c WHERE c.post_id = p.id AND c.deleted = 0) AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file f WHERE f.ref_type = 'POST' AND f.ref_id = p.id AND f.deleted = 0) AS file_count FROM board_post p INNER JOIN board b ON p.board_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.writer_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_post ( board_id, title, content, writer_id, view_count, is_notice, is_secret, created_at, created_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writerId}, 0, #{isNotice}, #{isSecret}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE board_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, is_notice = #{isNotice}, is_secret = #{isSecret}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE board_post SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE board_post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.board_id, p.title, p.created_at FROM board_post p WHERE p.board_id = #{boardId} AND p.id < #{id} AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.is_notice = 0 ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT p.id, p.board_id, p.title, p.created_at FROM board_post p WHERE p.board_id = #{boardId} AND p.id > #{id} AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.is_notice = 0 ORDER BY p.id ASC LIMIT 1
